/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/03_terrain_pbr_glfw.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/03_terrain_pbr_glfw.dir/platforms/editor/glfwmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/03_terrain_pbr_glfw.dir/engine/dependancies/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/03_terrain_pbr_glfw.dir/engine/dependancies/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/03_terrain_pbr_glfw.dir/engine/dependancies/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/03_terrain_pbr_glfw.dir/engine/dependancies/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/03_terrain_pbr_glfw.dir/engine/dependancies/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/03_terrain_pbr_glfw.dir/engine/dependancies/imgui/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o 03_terrain_pbr_glfw  -lGL -lGLEW -lglfw -lassimp
